name: demo-app
description: SonicJS public demo site (demo.sonicjs.com) — always runs latest main, data reset every promotion + every 2h

scripts.dev: npm run dev:build && npm run dev:watch
scripts.dev:watch: npm run dev:core & npx wait-on ../packages/core/dist/index.js && PORT=$(($(echo -n "$(basename $(cd .. && pwd))" | cksum | cut -d' ' -f1) % 1000 + 9000)) && echo "Demo dev server: http://localhost:$PORT" && wrangler dev --port $PORT --local 2>&1 | grep -v '\[wrangler:inf\]'
scripts.build: echo 'Worker build is handled by wrangler during deployment'
